Recovery 81 • Sleep 65 • Strain 21%

Read
Recovery is solid and output is still lighter than a usual day, but the morning is running unfed. For muscle protection, the afternoon favors a protein-forward first meal and a modest, not aggressive, deficit over more intensity.

Steady, not sharp.
